summary.headline: Archer-Daniels-Midland held its 2022 annual meeting and voted on various proposals.
summary.narrative_summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company held its 2022 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 5, 2022. At the meeting, shareholders voted on several proposals including the election of directors, ratification of auditors, advisory approval of executive compensation, and two stockholder proposals that were rejected.

extraction_notes: This filing is solely about the annual meeting of stockholders and does not contain any earnings information, segment commentary, or financial guidance.
